languages.text: "В каком-то смысле мои намерения — уже часть истории. Все, к чему я стремился, унесли пески времени. Между мной и забвением стоит лишь одна ошибка, исправив которую я смогу упокоиться. Возможно, Бог-Император примет меня после смерти, и я продолжу свои славные свершения подле него, в борьбе с Его врагами".

traits.locale_text: "В каком-то смысле мои намерения — уже часть истории. Все, к чему я стремился, унесли пески времени. Между мной и забвением стоит лишь одна ошибка, исправив которую я смогу упокоиться. Возможно, Бог-Император примет меня после смерти, и я продолжу свои славные свершения подле него, в борьбе с Его врагами".

languages.text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."
languages.original_text: "В каком-то смысле мои намерения — уже часть истории. Все, к чему я стремился, унесли пески времени. Между мной и забвением стоит лишь одна ошибка, исправив которую я смогу упокоиться. Возможно, Бог-Император примет меня после смерти, и я продолжу свои славные свершения подле него, в борьбе с Его врагами".

A single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish further glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

languages.text: "In gewisser Weise sind meine Entscheidungen schon Geschichte. Alles, wonach ich strebte, wurde vom Wind der Zeit fortgeweht. Ein einziger Fehler trennt mich vor der Vergessenheit, und sobald ich ihn korrigiere, kann ich mich zur Ruhe legen. Vielleicht wird mich der Gottimperator nach meinem Tod annehmen, auf dass ich an Seiner Seite im Kampf gegen Seine Feinde noch mehr ruhmreiche Taten vollbringen kann."
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

traits.locale_text: "In gewisser Weise sind meine Entscheidungen schon Geschichte. Alles, wonach ich strebte, wurde vom Wind der Zeit fortgeweht. Ein einziger Fehler trennt mich vor der Vergessenheit, und sobald ich ihn korrigiere, kann ich mich zur Ruhe legen. Vielleicht wird mich der Gottimperator nach meinem Tod annehmen, auf dass ich an Seiner Seite im Kampf gegen Seine Feinde noch mehr ruhmreiche Taten vollbringen kann."

languages.text: « D'une certaine manière, mes décisions appartiennent déjà à l'histoire. Tout ce pour quoi j'ai œuvré toute ma vie a été balayé par le temps. Une dernière erreur me sépare encore de l'oubli, et une fois corrigée, je pourrai enfin trouver le repos. Et si l'Empereur-Dieu a la bonté de m'accueillir après la mort, j'accomplirai peut-être de nouveaux exploits à Ses côtés, en combattant Ses ennemis. »
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

traits.locale_text: « D'une certaine manière, mes décisions appartiennent déjà à l'histoire. Tout ce pour quoi j'ai œuvré toute ma vie a été balayé par le temps. Une dernière erreur me sépare encore de l'oubli, et une fois corrigée, je pourrai enfin trouver le repos. Et si l'Empereur-Dieu a la bonté de m'accueillir après la mort, j'accomplirai peut-être de nouveaux exploits à Ses côtés, en combattant Ses ennemis. »

languages.text: «En cierto modo, mis decisiones ya son historia. Los vientos del tiempo se llevaron todo por lo que luché. Solo queda un error entre el olvido y yo, y, una vez lo corrija, podré descansar. Tal vez el Dios Emperador me acepte tras mi muerte y pueda lograr proezas más gloriosas a Su lado, luchando contra Sus enemigos».
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

Solo queda un error entre el olvido y yo, y, una vez lo corrija, podré descansar. Tal vez el Dios Emperador me acepte tras mi muerte y pueda lograr proezas más gloriosas a Su lado, luchando contra Sus enemigos».

languages.text: "Bir bakıma kararlarım zaten tarih oldu. Çabaladığım her şey, zamanın rüzgârlarında savrulup gitti. Benimle unutuluş arasında sadece tek bir hata duruyor ve onu düzelttiğimde huzur içinde yatabileceğim. Belki Tanrı İmparator ölümümden sonra beni kabul eder ve ben de O'nun düşmanlarıyla savaşarak O'nun yanında daha şanlı işler başarırım."
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

traits.locale_text: "Bir bakıma kararlarım zaten tarih oldu. Çabaladığım her şey, zamanın rüzgârlarında savrulup gitti. Benimle unutuluş arasında sadece tek bir hata duruyor ve onu düzelttiğimde huzur içinde yatabileceğim. Belki Tanrı İmparator ölümümden sonra beni kabul eder ve ben de O'nun düşmanlarıyla savaşarak O'nun yanında daha şanlı işler başarırım."

languages.text: “从某种意义上说，我的决定早已成为历史。我为之奋斗的一切，都已被岁月的风吹散。唯有一个错误，横亘在我与湮灭之间。一旦我将它纠正，便可安息。也许死后，神皇会接纳我，我将在祂身边，与祂的敌人作战，成就更辉煌的功业。”
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

traits.locale_text: “从某种意义上说，我的决定早已成为历史。我为之奋斗的一切，都已被岁月的风吹散。唯有一个错误，横亘在我与湮灭之间。一旦我将它纠正，便可安息。也许死后，神皇会接纳我，我将在祂身边，与祂的敌人作战，成就更辉煌的功业。”

languages.text: 「私の決断は、ある意味、すでに歴史。努力した全ては、時の流れに流されてしまった。私を忘れ去る唯一の障害は、たった一つの過ち。それを修正すれば、私は安らかに眠れるかもしれない。死後、神皇帝に迎えられ、彼と共に、敵を倒し、より輝かしい功績を成し遂げられるかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."

traits.locale_text: 「私の決断は、ある意味、すでに歴史。努力した全ては、時の流れに流されてしまった。私を忘れ去る唯一の障害は、たった一つの過ち。それを修正すれば、私は安らかに眠れるかもしれない。死後、神皇帝に迎えられ、彼と共に、敵を倒し、より輝かしい功績を成し遂げられるかもしれない。」
